creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text:
Somehow we missed adding the PHP 5.6 package names for the PHAR extention to an earlier entry.  That has now been fixed.

The other PHP bugs and cross reference to VuXML are listed below:

PHP Bug 69972 - https://vuxml.FreeBSD.org/freebsd/3d39e927-29a2-11e5-86ff-14dae9d210b8.html

PHP Bug 69970 - https://vuxml.FreeBSD.org/freebsd/af7fbd91-29a1-11e5-86ff-14dae9d210b8.html

PHP Bug 69768 - https://vuxml.FreeBSD.org/freebsd/5a1d5d74-29a0-11e5-86ff-14dae9d210b8.html
